name: Fig Bread with Sherry
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Cups Figs, stems removed, coarsely chopped (dark or light figs)
2 Large eggs or 2 cups Egg Beaters® 99% Egg Substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the figs and sherry in a bowl, and let stand at least 15 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, walnuts, cinnamon, baking soda, nutmeg, and salt.
3. In another mixing bowl, beat the sugar, oil, and eggs until well combined.
4. Gradually blend in the dry ingredients into the wet mixture.
5. Gently stir in the figs and sherry.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 5-by-9-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 1 hour, or until the bread feels firm when gently pressed in the center.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before inverting it onto a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 12 servings.
